Details: Two distinct PySpark pytest implementations testing different data processing pipelines. Both outputs are PySpark pytest scripts but address fundamentally different business problems. Agent 1 tests financial transaction aggregation (filtering active transactions, date ranges, joins, sum/avg calculations), while Agent 2 tests customer entity classification (person vs business identification, regex pattern matching, audit logging). However, Agent 1 uses simpler schema definitions and focuses on aggregation operations, while Agent 2 includes mock functions, window operations, and more complex entity type logic. Test organization and naming conventions are comparable.
